title: The "Right to be Forgotten" (RTBF) Orchestration
description: Architect reliable and idempotent deletion workflows for PII across distributed systems. Coordinate soft-deletes, hard-deletes, and downstream cache/backup purging to fulfill RTBF requests.
objectives: Architect reliable and idempotent deletion workflows for PII across distributed systems.
Coordinate soft-deletes, hard-deletes, and downstream cache/backup purging to fulfill RTBF requests.
